shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip build && python -m build'

/bin/bash -lc "mkdir -p /home/user/workspace/pypi/simple/vectorops && cp /home/user/workspace/vectorops/dist/vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl /home/user/workspace/pypi/simple/vectorops/ && cp /home/user/workspace/vectorops/dist/vectorops-0.1.0.tar.gz /home/user/workspace/pypi/simple/vectorops/ && cat > /home/user/workspace/pypi/simple/vectorops/index.html <<'EOF' <"'!doctype html> vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl
vectorops-0.1.0.tar.gz EOF cat > /home/user/workspace/pypi/simple/index.html <<'"'EOF' <"'!doctype html> vectorops EOF python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory /home/user/workspace/pypi > /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.log 2>&1 & echo $!'

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test && . /tmp/vectorops-test/bin/activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip >/dev/null && pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print(dotproduct([1,2,3], [4,5,6]))
PY"

/bin/bash -lc '(nohup python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory /home/user/workspace/pypi >/home/user/workspace/pypi-server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid) && sleep 1 && ss -ltnp '"'( sport = :8080 )' || true"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test && . /tmp/vectorops-test/bin/activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip >/dev/null && pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print('ok')
PY"

/bin/bash -lc 'nohup setsid python3 -m http.server 8080 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory /home/user/workspace/pypi >/home/user/workspace/pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $! > /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid; sleep 1; ss -ltnp '"'( sport = :8080 )' || true"

/bin/bash -lc 'kill 1823 || true; nohup setsid python3 -m http.server 8080 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory /home/user/workspace/pypi >/home/user/workspace/pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $! > /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid; sleep 1; ss -ltnp '"'( sport = :8080 )' || true"

/bin/bash -lc "cat /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.log 2>/dev/null || true; echo '---'; cat /home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid 2>/dev/null || true; echo '---'; ps -ef | rg 'http\\.server 8080|pypi' || true"
/bin/bash -lc 'command -v tmux || command -v screen || command -v setsid || command -v nohup'

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import os, sys, time
pid = os.fork()
if pid:
    print(pid)
    sys.exit(0)
os.setsid()
pid2 = os.fork()
if pid2:
    os._exit(0)
os.chdir('/home/user/workspace/pypi')
os.umask(0)
with open('/home/user/workspace/pypi-daemon.log', 'a', buffering=1) as log:
    os.dup2(log.fileno(), 1)
    os.dup2(log.fileno(), 2)
    os.execvp('python3', ['python3', '-m', 'http.server', '8080', '--bind', '0.0.0.0', '--directory', '/home/user/workspace/pypi'])
PY
sleep 1
ps -ef | rg 'http\\.server 8080' || true
ss -ltnp '( sport = :8080 )' || true"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test && . /tmp/vectorops-test/bin/activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip >/dev/null && pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print(dotproduct([1,2,3], [4,5,6]))
PY"
